rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in party. Demurrer to cause of action for Specific Performance is overruled; this cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of contract is sustained with leave to amend to allege recoverable damages. Demurrer to the cause of action for waste is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts re: applicability of discovery rule and Defendant's liability for the actions of its predecessor in interest. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Petition Of Defendant East West Bank To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Petition Of Defendant East West Bank To Compel Arbitration DENIED. The issue in dispute in this case, maintenance of the premises and waste (with no election to terminate the lease) are not subject to the arbitration clause contained in paragraph 33 and references in the first part of paragraph 12. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN MANN ET AL VS. AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANT AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC, MUATH ZGHOUL's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to November 8, 2016 for the moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and for the opposition party to provide a declaration stating the dates of (1) payment for and (2) receipt of Zhghoul Deposition Transcript. Courtesy copies shall be delivered with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and declaration shall be filed and delivered no later than October 24, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ISABEL WISKIND VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with 10-day leave to amend for plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION, A/K/A VS. VICKY LIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of James T. Lee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2016 line 7. PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to Romeo Baful, former trustor under the foreclosed DOT. Plaintiff shifted its burden and Mr. Baful failed to create a triable issue of material fact with competent admissible evidence. Also see May 21, 2015 judgment in CUD-14-647901. Motion is DENIED as to Bobby Lim. Moving party failed to shift its burden and provide competent admissible evidence showing that Bobby Lim fails within the category of persons subject to eviction under CCP 1161a(b)(2). Additionally, triable issue of fact exists regarding Mr. Lim's tenancy and its proper termination = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDY DINH LAM VS. CLARA YU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2016 line 10. PLAINTIFF ANDY LAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact re: intent. = (501/REQ)
